description: Fetches the assignment history for a specific Person, returning records of all assignments linked to them.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: Whether to include the project name for each assignment.

parameters.name: project_number
parameters.description: Filters items by their exact project number. The query performs an exact match. Example usage: `/v2/companies/{company_id}/...?project_number=BR-2024`

parameters.name: assignmentStart
parameters.description: Whether to include the assignment start date.

parameters.name: assignmentEnd
parameters.description: Whether to include the assignment end date.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Will return the daily start time for each assignment.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Will return the daily end time for each assignment.

parameters.name: cost_code
parameters.description: Will return the name and UUID of the Cost Code for each assignment.

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Will return the name and UUID of the Label for each assignment.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Will return a calculated duration for each listed assignment.

schema.description: Returns an array of Assignment History report objects.

items.description: Represents a single Assignment History report entry.

person_name.description: The first and last name of the Person (Project request only).

employee_number.description: The employee number of the assigned person (Project request only).

job_title.description: The job title of the assigned person (Project request only).

project_name.description: The name of the Project (Person request only).

project_number.description: The number of the Project (Person request only).

start_day.description: The start date of the assignment.

end_day.description: The end date of the assignment.

start_time.description: The daily start time of the assignment.

end_time.description: The daily end time of the assignment.

cost_code_name.description: The name of the Cost Code for the assignment.

cost_code_id.description: The UUID of the Cost Code for the assignment.

label_name.description: The name of the Label for the assignment.

label_id.description: The UUID of the Label for the assignment.

duration.description: The calculated duration of the assignment.
